name: Ewaso Ng'iro Early Warning System
blocking_factor: Gauge coverage gap in upper Ewaso (Laikipia plateau)
notes: 8 gauges on Ewaso Ng'iro operational. Critical upper catchment sections not covered. 4-hour warning achievable for Isiolo Town. Merti and Garba Tulla have no warning.

name: Isiolo County Flood Contingency Plan
blocking_factor: Staff turnover and funding gaps for annual updates
notes: Plan operational. Pre-positioned stocks adequate for 10
column12: 000 displaced persons. Merti corridor not covered. Plan not updated since 2021.

name: Ewaso Ng'iro Riparian Land Use
blocking_factor: Pastoralist seasonal land use patterns incompatible with fixed riparian buffers
notes: Riparian buffer concept not well-suited to pastoral context. Traditional seasonal grazing patterns predate NEMA framework. Enforcement would criminalise customary land use.

name: Isiolo Town Drainage and Flood Protection
blocking_factor: County revenue base insufficient without devolved funding
notes: Design complete 2022. County cannot finance without national government transfer. Budget submitted and not approved two consecutive years.
